mapper.sql: select apply_id, apply_no, institution_id, elder_id, apply_amount, apply_reason, urgency_level, expected_use_date, attachments, apply_status, family_confirm_name, family_relation, family_phone, family_approve_time, family_approve_opinion, approver, approve_time, approve_remark, actual_amount, use_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from fund_transfer_apply

select fta.apply_id, fta.apply_no, fta.institution_id, fta.elder_id, fta.apply_amount, fta.apply_reason, fta.urgency_level, fta.expected_use_date, fta.attachments, fta.apply_status, fta.family_confirm_name, fta.family_relation, fta.family_phone, fta.family_approve_time, fta.family_approve_opinion, fta.approver, fta.approve_time, fta.approve_remark, fta.actual_amount, fta.use_time, fta.create_by, fta.create_time, fta.update_by, fta.update_time, fta.remark, pi.institution_name, ei.elder_name, ei.id_card, CONCAT(bi.room_number, '-', bi.bed_number) as bed_info, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(ft.transfer_no SEPARATOR ', ') FROM fund_transfer_apply_detail ftad LEFT JOIN fund_transfer ft ON ftad.transfer_id = ft.transfer_id WHERE ftad.apply_id = fta.apply_id ) as transfer_nos from fund_transfer_apply fta left join pension_institution pi on fta.institution_id = pi.institution_id left join elder_info ei on fta.elder_id = ei.elder_id left join ( select elder_id, bed_id from bed_allocation where (elder_id, allocation_id) in ( select elder_id, max(allocation_id) from bed_allocation group by elder_id ) ) ba on fta.elder_id = ba.elder_id left join bed_info bi on ba.bed_id = bi.bed_id
mapper.select: where fta.elder_id = #{elderId} order by fta.create_time desc
where fta.institution_id = #{institutionId} order by fta.create_time desc

select ft.transfer_id, ft.transfer_no, ft.institution_id, ft.elder_id, ft.order_id, ft.transfer_amount, ft.billing_month, ft.transfer_date, ft.status, ft.is_paid, ei.elder_name from fund_transfer ft left join elder_info ei on ft.elder_id = ei.elder_id where ft.elder_id = #{elderId} and ft.is_paid = '0' and ft.status = 'pending' order by ft.billing_month
mapper.insert:
insert into fund_transfer_apply
apply_no, institution_id, elder_id, apply_amount, apply_reason, urgency_level, expected_use_date, attachments, apply_status, family_confirm_name, family_relation, family_phone, family_approve_time, family_approve_opinion, approver, approve_time, approve_remark, actual_amount, use_time, create_by, remark, create_time
#{applyNo}, #{institutionId}, #{elderId}, #{applyAmount}, #{applyReason}, #{urgencyLevel}, #{expectedUseDate}, #{attachments}, #{applyStatus}, #{familyConfirmName}, #{familyRelation}, #{familyPhone}, #{familyApproveTime}, #{familyApproveOpinion}, #{approver}, #{approveTime}, #{approveRemark}, #{actualAmount}, #{useTime}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, NOW()
mapper.delete:
delete from fund_transfer_apply where apply_id in
#{applyId}
